para_trans: to be done through the Facility Development Cell.
Government Certificate No: NHM / 1125 / Q. No.348 / NHM (1185291)
10th Floor, Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital Complex Building,
Read: - Department of Public Health, Government Circular No. NHM / 1125 / Q. No. 348 / NHM
In the above Government Circular, Shri. In 29/07/2025, point no. Done in 6 and 11
The corrections should read as follows.
table_trans: Issue No. 06 "Since the National Health Mission is an ambitious scheme of the Union Government for strengthening healthcare, no more than 3 works should be commissioned per contractor for speedy and quality completion of construction, electrification works under the Infrastructure Development Cell. Contractors who have undertaken 3 works should not be made eligible for further commissioning orders or tenders unless they have completed all three of their works."

Issue No. 06 As the National Health Mission is an ambitious scheme of the Union Government to strengthen healthcare, the condition of Bid Capacity should be applied for all works above the cost of Rs. 50 lakhs for speedy and quality completion of construction, electrification works under the Infrastructure Development Cell. However, if the same contractor undertakes three or more works in a year, the condition of Bid Capacity will be applicable for further tenders in that financial year.

para_trans: Government Decision NHM-1125 / P.No.348 / NHM Computer No. 1185291 Page 2 of 3
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: Issue No. 11 "Complaints of confirmed representatives, competitors, bidders regarding bid capacity in line with the ongoing works under Infrastructure Development Cell under National Health Mission have been detected. Accordingly, it will be mandatory for the Divisional Executive Engineer to verify the confidential reports of the bidders after technical verification by taking an affidavit regarding the ongoing works of the bidders so as to ensure that not more than 3 works and works exceeding the bid capacity go to the same bidders."
Issue No. 11 Contractors will be obliged to submit tender information for all works undertaken in the current financial year.
